## Phase Boundary

Implement the Research Orchestrator — the gate agent that controls all phase transitions. Orchestrator makes gate decisions that cite specific agent artifacts. Gate logic tests pass for all 4 phase transitions (approve and reject paths). Orchestrator maintains "current best understanding" document across phases.
